kept.text:
🚨🔥 BOMBA: Windows 11 artık tam anlamıyla konsola dönüştü.

👉 Microsoft, Xbox Modu’nu tüm uyumlu PC’lere açtı. Sadece ROG Xbox Ally’ye özel değil. Tek tıkla aktif → masaüstü yok → direkt oyun arayüzü.

🎮 Xbox, Steam, Battlenet, Epic Games… 

Hepsi tek yerde. Oyunları açmak için Windows içinde kaybolma derdi bitiyor.

🚀 Asıl olay performans:
Arka plan süreçleri kapanıyor, gereksiz yükler gidiyor.

+2 GB’a kadar RAM boşalıyor,
bekleme tüketimi 3’te 2 düşüyor.

🖥️ Bonus: Auto Super Resolution (şimdilik Insider)

Harici ekranda 1440p kalitesine yakın görüntü.

profile_bio.description: 👨‍💻 Web Developer & Computer Engineer

kept.text:
Greetings employees of Halcyon! 

An update to the Spacer's Choice edition of the game on Epic Games Store was accidentally pushed out early. The team is going to rollback to an update that was scheduled to release on Monday. The update will be available on all platforms at 11 AM PDT. If you have a save from this recent patch it will not work with the rollback version. You will have to load an earlier save before the version change on April 30th.

The 2nd update will come later in May, and we are excited to share that with players.

The Board apologies for this mix-up and please let us know if you run into any issues by contacting our support team.

https://t.co/qTdvWNmVmk

The Epic Games Store, Fortnite, and Rocket League Sideswipe are now available on iPhones in Japan, thanks to the Mobile Software Competition Act. We’re launching the store with our games to start, while we continue to work with regulators to enforce the law and eliminate Apple’s scare screens and fees that undermine competition and choice.

https://t.co/EtFDhG0wgC

"The idea of survival horror games, mixing with Darth Vader, one of the scariest great characters to ever come out of cinema is perfect. [And] droids, who doesn't want to build droids? We’re all really excited to give fans these authentic tools that could empower them to create their own Star Wars experiences." 
– James Waugh, Senior Vice President of Franchise Story and Creative Strategy at Lucasfilm

kept.text:
iPhoneにFortnite復活！やり方解説！

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📲 インストール手順
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
①  Safariで「Epic Games Store」と検索🔍
② 公式サイトから「インストールする」をタップ
③ 「設定」→「アプリのインストールを管理」へ
④ Epic Games Storeを許可✅
⑤ Face IDで認証
⑥ Epic Gamesにサインイン
⑦ Fortniteをダウンロード（約5GB）⬇️
⑧ Epic Gamesにサインインしてプレイ開始🚀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎯 ポイント
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ 最大120fpsでプレイ可能
🖼️ クオリティ最大で超高画質
🎮 コントローラー対応
📦 現在はFortnite & Rocket Leagueの2種類
🌐 サーバー混雑時は何度か試してみてください

#フォートナイト #Fortnite #iOS

kept.text:
The Epic Games Store is live in Japan on iOS and is the return of Fortnite on iOS there! Japanese players can also now grab othe Epic games Rocket League Sideswipe and Fall Guys for the first time ever. No third-party games are available yet as the new CTC fees and reporting obligations are hard to decipher for studios and creating friction that needs to be overcome. We will continue to work with developers on that as Epic prepares to launch Epic Games Store for iOS in Brazil next.

https://t.co/Cxx1SQSzzg

kept.text:
[Free] Epic Games Store แจกฟรี! Streets of Rage 4 เวอร์ชันมือถือ หมดเวลา 7 พ.ค. นี้!
.
อันนี้ไม่ใช่เกมถูก แต่เป็นเกมฟรี กับ Epic Games Store Mobile ที่ตอนนี้กำลังแจกฟรี  Streets of Rage 4 เวอร์ชันมือถือ ผู้ที่สนใจสามารถเข้าไปรับมาเล่นอย่างเมามันได้ที่หน้าร้านค้า
.
แจกฟรีถึง 4 ทุ่ม วันที่ 7 พ.ค. 2026 หลังหมดเวลาก็ยังเล่นต่อได้ เพราะเป็นการแจกฟรีถาวร 
.
ส่วนตัวเกมก็ ภาคต่อของเกมซีรีส์แอ็กชันต่อยตีเดินด้านข้างระดับตำนาน ที่เป็นการกลับมาครั้งแรกในรอบ 25 ปี หลังภาคล่าสุด โดยนำเสนอกราฟิกสไตล์การ์ตูนคอมิกส์ย้อนยุค และแอนเมชันที่ลื่นไหล กราฟิกจัดจ้าน พร้อมตัวละครใหม่เพิ่มเข้ามา ให้ผู้เล่นเลือกฝ่าฟัน 12 ด่านที่หลากหลาย เพื่อนำความสงบสุขกลับคืนสู่ท้องถนน พร้อมด้วยโหมดต่างๆ ทั้ง Story, Training, Arcade และอื่นๆ ใครที่ยังไม่เคยเล่นก็ไปรับมาเล่นฟรีกันตามระเบียบ

kept.text:
Lançado GameHub 6.0 BETA!

Novidades:
- Interface do usuário totalmente redesenhada, reconstruída do zero com um visual mais limpo e moderno.
- Suporte para os modos retrato e paisagem, com layouts otimizados para ambas as orientações.
- Integração com a Epic Games, expandindo o suporte a plataformas além do PC e Steam.
- Seção dedicada a jogos retrô, facilitando a busca e o gerenciamento de títulos clássicos.
- Sistema de biblioteca aprimorado, com páginas de jogos mais detalhadas e visuais melhores.
- Melhorias de desempenho e correções de bugs para uma experiência mais fluida e estável.

Também incluído:
- Um novo sistema "Destaques" e "Mais Populares" para destacar jogos em alta, com a possibilidade de selecionar categorias de jogos.
- Páginas de jogos maiores e mais imersivas com imagens de fundo.

ATENÇÃO você não poderá retornar à versão 5.3.0 e poderá perder seus dados ao atualizar para a versão 6.0 beta.

kept.text:
The Epic Games Store is live in Japan on iOS and is the path of return for Fortnite on iOS there! Japanese players can also grab Rocket League Sideswipe. No third-party games are available yet as the new CTC fees and reporting obligations are hard to decipher for studios and creating friction that needs to be overcome. We will continue to work with developers on that as Epic prepares to launch Epic Games Store for iOS in Brazil next.

kept.text:
“You can’t leisure yourself to meaning.”
              — LucasArts & Epic Games President Paul Meegan, reflecting on six months of attempted retirement before reenlisting the core Fortnite team to pursue a new learning-tech startup with the mission to help every person maximize their potential and live a life of meaning.

Fortnite is the compelling collaborative game that grew to 250 million users and $6.3B in revenue in its first year.  “AWS told us Fortnite is their #2 customer, second only to the CIA.”

The new company is in stealth mode for now but has found a deep reservoir of motivation and meaning in their pursuit of a meaningful mission. Not just for two billion children but lifelong learning and reskilling for adults as well:  “60 million American adults are functionally illiterate and innumerate.”

In contrast, companies like “OnlyFans, Affirm, Klarna and DraftKings democratize exploitation of the user.”

Interviewed by the intrepid Brendan McCord, founder of Cosmos Institute  — the academy for philosopher-builders: https://t.co/i44fqpdwh4
